title: Board Colors Inside a Workspace
excerpt: Can you create a new feature that allows us to color code the boards (on the left side) inside a workspace? For example, we can color-code the folders but ideally it would help a lot if we can highlight/color the actual …

posts.author: hollyvera (Holly Duque)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you create a new feature that allows us to color code the boards (on the left side) inside a workspace? For example, we can color-code the folders but ideally it would help a lot if we can highlight/color the actual board or work documents.

posts.author: BenWalker (Ben)
posts.cookedHtml: Second this, it would help easily identify what type of project was being worked on and not needed referencing in the board name!
